Banded Orc Vest  
 


Slot: CHEST
AC: 8
CHA: -3
SV DISEASE: +3
WT: 5.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM
Race: ELF HIE DEF HEF HFL FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Banded Orc Vest

Slot: CHEST
AC: 8
CHA: -3
SV DISEASE: +3
WT: 5.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM
Race: ELF HIE DEF HEF HFL FRG
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):50, 50, 50
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 2 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:12
Submitted By:Talteron
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 05:01:11
Page Updated:Tue Sep 27th, 2022

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 14pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 10
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Orc Vest

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Greater Faydark
West Freeport


Uploaded September 27th, 2022 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Got to get it right
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2005 at 7:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591847490536
View User Forum
2 posts
The Greater Faydark quest works just fine. You got to make sure you are giving her the right combo.

The merchant Linadian, up some platforms from main lift, will make a Banded Orc Vest for you when you give her 2 legionaire shoulderpads, an orc fist belt and 10 gold.

Linadian says, 'Glad you are interested! I can create a leather vest I call a banded orc vest. It will aid you in repelling any disease and offers quite a bit of protection in battle. I will need some materials. For a Deathfist banded orc vest, I require two legionaire pads worn by the clan Deathfist, one Deathfist slashed belt, and ten gold coins. For a Crushbone banded orc vest, I require two legionnaire pads worn by the Clan Crushbone, one Crushbone belt, and one silk swatch.'

I submitted two "Crushbone Pads," a Crushbone belt, and the silk swatch, for a successful combine.



Make sure for the CB you don't give gold, make the silk swatch and give that to her with the CB pads and CB belt. NO GOLD for the CB vest

My dwarf needs something until he can get his newb quest tunic. Looks like I have to hang around CB and see if anyone will be nice enough to drop a dwarven tunic on me.

Orc Vest
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2002 at 1:12 PM Rating: Decent
amastropolo
View User Forum
Sage
864 posts

It still works in Kelethin. I did it about 1 week ago. I think many people are giving her 10GP instead of the silk swatch, which is why they fail. If you hail her, she'll tell you what she wants. It took me forever to find two spider silks to make the swatch though. I must have killed about 30 of them before I got two. I guess they knew I needed it for a quest, LOL.

I want to try the deathfist version, out of curiosity, but I only have a deathfist belt, and no pads. Interesting quest, and the armor sold for a little more than 1PP in Kelethin.

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 23 2001 at 12:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) for BOTH quest you need fraction don't know how much yet but i tried the sister quest in freeport and din't work becuase i had no fraction with champions of faydark. i'm on my way to unrest right now so i'll try the quest in Gf to see if it works there and if not i'll see what i can do about it becuase i've made a few GM friends. and please make sure you give her 10 gold ont 1 platinum.
Faction and Exp.
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 6:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763501175
Scholar
71 posts
I have not tried the "sister quest" in NFP with the DF belt/pads etc. But what what I can see its alot more reliable(or at least less confusing).

"Why even bother doing the quest to get this item. " For until about lvl 21 you can get almost a full bubble of blue exp from doing this quest Great for those who have skills maxed and just need exp to the next lvl.

And even if you die and loose that exp you got from handing it in and getting a few you still have the faction it gives you(merchant faction is in this quest). I did the quest about 20 times(for merchant faction) until I got bored of getting pads and belts, now my merchant faction is pretty good.

Funny though, I cant remember what items to give her to make it work, Ill try tonight and post again with a definate answer on what items she needs for it to work.

If you decide to do this for faction and exp you will have a load of vests that sell for about 1pp each to a merchant. And since I am a druid who cant use the vest I either sell it to a merchant or give it away to a newbie.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 26 2001 at 5:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why even bother doing the quest to get this item. The best thing you can do whith it is to sell it and buy a Banded tunic instead, it's much better.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 26 2001 at 5:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why even bother doing the quest to get this item. The best thing you can do whith it is to sell it and buy a Banded tunic instead, it's much better.
huh?

IT works in Freeport
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2001 at 7:03 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
you can do this quest in Freeport at an elven girl there.
She will make both CB vests and DF vests, but you have to give her 2 of the same thing, i think the CB is slightly better.
But both CD and DF both work with her as of 12 June 2001

broken quest kelethin
QuoteReply
# May 26 2001 at 3:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757026949
6 posts
it is broken in kelethin i have asked linadian over and over to make sure. she asks for crush bone pads and a a crushbone belt plus 10gp : or deathfist pads and a deathfistbelt plus 10gp. But gives nothing when you give the crushbone stuff exactly as she asks. i petetioned and am getting the run around. ive even tried my other characters, with same result. DONT do this quest untill they fix it. it may work in freeport, but not kelethin (although some people say they can do it after a few tries, i know some people who have tried it numerous times with the crushbone stuff and never got anything). Very frustrating. I know people are going to say "it works, i did it!" But it doesnt always. There is a problem with the kelethin part and verant wont give me a straight answer. I just want the vest, i dont care about the exp or faction hits.

It is very easy to mistake a regular cloth belt, or a tattered belt, for the CB belts. I have made this mistake myself many times.

I have done this quest a few times in the past, and it worked just fine. I gave the merchant the 2 crushbone pads a crushbone belt and 10 gold like she asks. and voila' a banded orc vest. Lately tho I have tried to do the quest and she just absorbs the items and money with out so much as a thank you, and certainly didnt give me a vest! Did they change the "recipe" for the quest or am I doing something wrong? Who knows!

# Jan 26 2001 at 4:44 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I've had Canloe Nusbeck do this a couple times as well. Have noticed that if I hail him between belts, pads, etc that it does not seem to happen. Don't need to respond to the hail, just hail him then give him the items. Don't know if it actually has anything to do with it or not, but since it seems to be working... I'll keep it up. Hope this helps you.

The exact thing happened to me. I gave the merchant in Kelethin all of the items (2 lego pads, 1 cb belt, 10 gold) and she took them without saying a word and gave me no vest. Nothing. I petitioned, but they ignored me (on Cazic Thule server). Very upset. As a low level newbie, the 2 pads represent a great deal of sweat and risk. Very mad at EQ right now.
